name: explore
description: Search the X (Twitter) API spec for endpoints. No network calls - runs against an in-memory endpoint catalog covering tweet search, user lookup, media download, monitoring, giveaways, composition, and more.

arguments.name: code
arguments.desc: Bounded filter over the API spec. The tool provides a spec.endpoints array with method, path, summary, category, free, parameters, and responseShape fields.

name: xquik
description: Send confirmed Xquik API requests across 119 MCP catalog routes. 118 support JSON or text. Covers search, lookup, extraction, writes, monitoring, draws, trends, and composition.

arguments.name: code
arguments.desc: Bounded request using xquik.request(path, options?) for authenticated requests to the Xquik API.
